Accredited · Trusted · Compassionate

Your Health,
Our Highest Priority

SmartCare Hospital delivers world-class medical care through cutting-edge technology and a team of compassionate specialists dedicated entirely to you.

Patient Services

What Can We Help You With?

Fast access to the services our patients need most every day.

Book Appointment

Schedule with any specialist in under 2 minutes online.

Find a Doctor

Search our consultant team by name or speciality.

Billing & Payments

View and settle your hospital bills securely online.

Emergency Services

24/7 emergency care with rapid response teams on standby.

Clinical Specialties

Our Medical Departments

Expert care across a comprehensive range of specialties — all under one roof, for every stage of life.

Cardiology

Heart & Cardiovascular Care

State-of-the-art diagnostics and treatment for all heart conditions, from routine screening to complex intervention.

Learn More
Neurology

Brain & Nervous System

Comprehensive neurological care covering stroke, epilepsy, headache disorders, and neurodegenerative conditions.

Learn More
Orthopaedics

Bone, Joint & Spine

Expert surgical and non-surgical management of musculoskeletal conditions, sports injuries, and joint replacements.

Learn More
Paediatrics

Children's Health

Dedicated paediatric specialists providing compassionate, family-centred care for newborns through to adolescents.

Learn More
General Medicine

Comprehensive Primary Care

Comprehensive medical care focused on diagnosis, treatment, and prevention of a wide range of adult health conditions.

Learn More
Maternity

Women's Health & Maternity

Comprehensive obstetric and gynaecological care supporting women at every stage of life with warmth and expertise.

Learn More
Meet the Team

15+Years of Excellence
Why Choose Us

A Hospital Built Around You

At SmartCare Hospital, every decision — from equipment to staffing — is made with one goal: providing you and your family the finest possible care.

JCI-Accredited Facility
We meet international standards of patient safety, care quality, and clinical governance.
Advanced Medical Technology
MRI, CT, Digital X-Ray, and a fully equipped ICU with smart monitoring systems.
Expert Multidisciplinary Teams
Specialists collaborate closely to deliver holistic, coordinated care for every patient.
Minimal Wait Times
Smart scheduling and real-time management keep wait times low and your time respected.
Patient Experience

Your Journey at SmartCare

From the moment you arrive, every step is thoughtfully designed for your comfort, safety, and fast recovery.

1
Arrival
Check in at reception or via our app
2
Triage
Vitals recorded & urgency assessed
3
Consultation
See your assigned consultant
4
Admission
Bed assigned, care begins
5
Discharge
Doctor sign-off & care summary
6
Billing
Invoice settled online or at desk
Patient Stories

What Our Patients Say

Thousands of patients and families trust SmartCare Hospital with their most important moments.

"
★★★★★

From the moment I walked in, the staff made me feel cared for. My surgery went perfectly and the recovery support was exceptional. I cannot recommend SmartCare enough.

Priscilla Aikude
Orthopaedic Patient, 2024
"
★★★★★

My mother was admitted for a cardiac episode. The cardiology team worked tirelessly. She's fully recovered now and we are forever grateful to everyone at SmartCare Hospital.

Regina Blackson
Family Member, Cardiology Ward
"
★★★★★

The maternity ward team were absolute angels. My delivery was smooth and I felt completely safe and heard throughout. The facilities are beautiful and spotlessly clean.

Catherine Ameh
Maternity Patient, 2024

Ready to See a Specialist?

Book your appointment online in minutes. Our team is ready to provide the care you deserve.

SmartCare Hospital delivers exceptional medical care built on compassion, cutting-edge technology, and decades of clinical expertise — serving Lagos and beyond.

JCI Accredited Hospital
